HomePage.description: Discover newly generated tech blog posts.

About.heroDesc:
Analyze GitHub commits and automatically generate professional tech blog posts.
Focus on coding — AI handles the rest.
About.feature1Desc: AI automatically analyzes and writes posts when commits are detected.
About.feature2Desc: Beyond simple summaries, AI understands the intent and context of changes.
About.feature3Desc: Generates technical posts with the depth of a senior engineer's retrospective.
About.testimonialsDesc: Don't sacrifice your weekends. Experience the magic of Synapso.dev as chosen by devs and recruiters.
About.ctaDescAuth:
Click to view and manage your posts.
Turn your code into valuable articles instantly.
About.ctaDescGuest:
Sign in with GitHub to start immediately.
Create your first AI-powered post now.

Pricing.title:
Focus on Development.
AI handles the writing.
Pricing.desc: Just write code. We analyze your commits and turn them into professional technical posts.
Pricing.faq1A: 100% of the intellectual property rights (including copyright) belong to the user who provided the original data (commits and code). Synapso.dev does not use your code for AI training and deletes it immediately after analysis.
Pricing.faq2Q: Can I use it for free forever?
Pricing.faq2A: Yes, the Basic (Free) plan supports 3 AI post generations per month for free. Upgrade to Pro for more professional and deeper analysis.
Pricing.basicDesc: For students and juniors who write occasionally
Pricing.proDesc: For professional devs building personal brands
Pricing.loginRequiredDesc: Please sign in to proceed with payment.

Generate.title: New Post
Generate.desc: AI analyzes your GitHub repository commits and automatically writes blog posts
Generate.loginRequired: Sign in is required to generate posts.
Generate.authError: Authentication required. Please sign in again.

Jobs.title: Jobs
Jobs.desc: Track ongoing AI analysis and managed generated drafts
Jobs.emptyDesc: Select a GitHub commit to start analyzing.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.desc: Manage your posting mode and automation preferences
Settings.loginRequired: Sign in is required to access settings.
Settings.planDesc: Check your current plan and monthly usage
Settings.limitReached: You've reached your monthly limit. Upgrade to Pro for 30 generations/month.
Settings.modeDesc:
Enable Auto Mode to automatically analyze new commits and create drafts.
You decide when to publish.
Settings.modeAutoDesc:
AI generates drafts automatically when new commits are detected.
Publish them from the Jobs page.
Settings.modeManualDesc:
Select commits manually to generate posts.
You can start analysis whenever you want.
Settings.autoNoticeDesc:
In Auto Mode, analysis counts are deducted once completed.
In Manual Mode, you can cancel before analysis finishes.
Settings.scheduleDailyDesc: Check for new commits once a day
Settings.scheduleWeeklyDesc: Check for new commits once a week
Settings.repoDesc: Select repositories for automatic commit analysis
Settings.repoLimit: Free plan allows only 1 repository. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited selection.

HowItWorks.title:
Keep the developer's workflow.
Zero-friction automation.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Seamlessly sync with your GitHub account via secure OAuth.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Gemini AI deeply understands the intent and context of your code changes.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Generates professional markdown posts covering problems and solutions.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Publish instantly with one click. SEO and social metadata applied automatically.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1Desc: Synapso.dev ("Service") is a platform that automatically generates blog posts from GitHub commits.
Terms.section2Point1: Copyright: 100% of generated content belongs to the user.
Terms.section2Point2: Zero Data Retention: Source code is destroyed after analysis.
Terms.contact: For inquiries regarding terms, please contact us via email.

PostDetail.watermark: This post was automatically generated by {link}.
